[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011001101 5
1 0111001100 5
2 0111001110 6
3 1000011010 4
4 0100100111 5
5 1000111101 6
6 0001010110 4
7 0011001101 5
